common_unsavedContent: What you've entered will be lost when this closes
error_forbidden: You don't have permission to access this page
error_generic: Request failed, please try again later
error_unauthenticated: Session expired, please sign in again
error_captchaFailed: Captcha verification failed, please try again
error_rateLimited: Too many requests, please try again later
error_phoneRegionNotSupported: Phone numbers from this region are not supported
error_phoneAlreadyBound: This phone number is already linked to another account
auth_identifierRule: Please enter your username, email or phone number
auth_usernameRule: 3-32 characters, starts with a letter; letters, digits, . _ - allowed
auth_oauthCompleteHint: Your WeChat identity is verified. Set up the account details below to finish signing up.
auth_totpPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or a recovery code.
auth_emailRule: Please enter a valid email address
auth_passwordRule: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth_phoneRule: Please enter a valid phone number
auth_forgotHint: Enter your registered email and we will send you a reset link
auth_resetLinkSent: If this email is registered, a reset link is on its way
auth_resetSuccess: Password reset. All other devices were signed out — sign in with your new password
auth_verifyFailed: The link is invalid or has expired
profile_passwordChanged: Password changed. Other devices have been signed out
profile_verifyEmailSent: Verification email sent, please check your inbox
profile_totpHint: Require a code from an authenticator app (TOTP) in addition to the password when signing in.
profile_totpRecoveryHint: Save these recovery codes somewhere safe — they are shown only once. Each code signs you in once if you lose the authenticator.
profile_totpFirstCode: Enter the first code from your authenticator to confirm
usersPage_identifierRequired: Provide a username or an email
usersPage_passwordReset: Password reset; all their sessions were signed out
permission_audit_read: View the audit trail of admin actions
settingsPage_openRegistrationHint: Allow new users to sign up on their own
settingsPage_signupIdentifiersHint: Which identifiers the register form collects; at least one is required. Email and phone are code-verified at sign-up
settingsPage_phoneNeedsSms: Phone sign-up requires a configured SMS channel
settingsPage_emailNeedsChannel: Email sign-up requires a configured email channel
settingsPage_siteLogoHint: Square image recommended; shown in the sidebar and on the sign-in page
settingsPage_siteFaviconHint: Shown in the browser tab; PNG/SVG/ICO supported
systemPage_storageLocalDesc: Files live on the server's disk — zero external dependencies, suited to single-instance deployments
systemPage_storageS3Desc: Any S3-compatible service: AWS S3, MinIO, R2, …
systemPage_storageDirectoryHint: Directory on the server; relative paths resolve against the server working directory. Empty uses data/storage
systemPage_profilesHint: Add multiple profiles, e.g. local disk and a cloud bucket, and bind them by purpose
systemPage_publicBaseUrlHint: When set, the bucket is treated as public and files are served from this URL; leave empty for a private bucket accessed via short-lived signed links
systemPage_bindingsHint: Pick which profile each kind of file uses; unbound features stay unavailable
systemPage_pickProviderHint: Pick a service type — it can't be changed after creation
systemPage_altchaDesc: Open-source proof-of-work challenge; no external service
systemPage_altchaDifficultyHint: Higher is slower for bots and users alike; 0 uses the default
systemPage_smtpDesc: Standard email delivery protocol, works with any provider
systemPage_llmOpenaiDesc: Covers most model services: official, DeepSeek, Qwen, self-hosted, …
systemPage_oauthOidcDesc: Generic OpenID Connect — Google, Keycloak, Authentik, …
systemPage_oauthProfilesHint: Add multiple third-party login profiles, e.g. company SSO and WeChat QR
systemPage_oauthKeyHint: Lowercase slug used in the sign-in URL; immutable after creation
systemPage_oauthKeyRule: Starts with a lowercase letter; lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only
systemPage_oauthDisplayNameHint: Text shown on the login button
systemPage_oauthIssuerHint: The identity service's issuer URL; configuration is discovered automatically
systemPage_oauthScopesHint: Leave empty for openid profile email
systemPage_oauthCallbackHint: Register this URL in the identity service's application settings
systemPage_oauthBindingsHint: Pick the login profiles offered on the sign-in page; unbound profiles are hidden
systemPage_oauthWechatHint: WeChat Open Platform website application (QR-code login). Set the callback domain to this site's domain at open.weixin.qq.com.
systemPage_llmBaseUrlHint: Leave empty for the official endpoint; fill in the API URL for self-hosted or third-party services
systemPage_llmProfilesHint: Add multiple model profiles, e.g. a fast cost-effective model and a stronger reasoning model
systemPage_llmBindingsHint: Pick which model profile each AI feature uses; unbound features stay unavailable
systemPage_emailProfilesHint: Add multiple sending profiles, e.g. a dedicated verification channel and a notification channel
systemPage_emailBindingsHint: Pick which sending profile each kind of mail uses; unbound features stay unavailable
systemPage_smsProfilesHint: Add multiple SMS profiles, e.g. a domestic channel and an international channel
systemPage_smsBindingsHint: Pick which profile each kind of SMS uses; unbound features stay unavailable
systemPage_captchaProfilesHint: Add multiple CAPTCHA profiles and enable them per scenario
systemPage_captchaBindingsHint: Pick which profile each scenario uses; unbound scenarios skip the challenge
dashboard_subtitle: Welcome back. Here is an overview of your system.
permission_user_write: Create, update and delete users; assign roles
permission_system_read: View system settings (storage, CAPTCHA, email, SMS, AI, payments)
permission_system_write: Change system settings and run channel tests
permission_workflow_read: View workflow runs and their steps
profile_noBindingChannels: No binding channels available — configure email, SMS or third-party login in system settings first
permission_payment_write: Create, sync and refund payment orders
systemPage_paymentProfilesHint: Add multiple gateways, e.g. Alipay and WeChat Pay — bound profiles all appear as checkout options
systemPage_paymentBindingsHint: Pick the gateways for each checkout slot; multiple allowed, the payer chooses at pay time
systemPage_alipayDesc: Alipay open-platform merchant payments (F2F / mobile-web / mini-program)
systemPage_alipayAppPrivateKeyHint: The RSA private key you generated for the app; PEM or bare key body
systemPage_alipayPublicKeyHint: The Alipay public key shown on the open platform (not your app public key)
systemPage_wechatMchPrivateKeyHint: The private key of the merchant API certificate (apiclient_key.pem)
systemPage_wechatAuthMethodHint: Merchants onboarded after 2024 use public-key mode; older merchants can auto-download platform certificates
systemPage_paymentMethodsHint: Only check the products you actually enabled/signed for in the provider console; the checkout offers exactly what is selected here
systemPage_paymentMethodsRequired: Select at least one payment product
systemPage_alipayOpAppIdHint: Required for mini-program payment (JSAPI): the mini-program APPID bound to this product on the open platform (op_app_id)
payments_noOptions: No gateway is bound to the checkout slot — add a payment profile and bind it in settings first
payments_scanWithAlipay: Scan with the Alipay app to pay
payments_scanWithWechat: Scan with the WeChat app to pay
payments_payerIdHint: WeChat openid or Alipay buyer ID, obtained through the client's authorization flow
payments_returnUrlHint: Optional: the merchant page the buyer's browser returns to after paying
payments_pickProfileFirst: Select a payment channel above first
payments_method_precreate_desc: Merchant shows a QR code; the buyer scans it in Alipay to pay (alipay.trade.precreate)
payments_method_page_pay_desc: A desktop web page redirects to the Alipay cashier to pay (alipay.trade.page.pay)
payments_method_wap_pay_desc: A mobile browser hands off to the Alipay app to pay (alipay.trade.wap.pay)
payments_method_create_desc: Invoked inside an Alipay mini-program; needs the payer id and mini-program APPID (alipay.trade.create)
payments_method_app_pay_desc: The server returns a signed order string the native app hands to the Alipay SDK (alipay.trade.app.pay)
payments_method_native_desc: Merchant shows a QR code; the buyer scans it in WeChat to pay
payments_method_h5_desc: A mobile browser outside WeChat hands off to WeChat Pay
payments_method_jsapi_desc: Invoked inside a WeChat official account or mini-program; needs the buyer's openid
payments_method_app_desc: WeChat APP payment: the server returns invoke params the native app hands to the WeChat SDK
payments_h5Hint: Open this link in a mobile browser to pay
payments_jsapiHint: In-app payment parameters must be passed to the provider SDK by the client app; shown here for reference only
